title: sporobolus angustus
intro: Sporobolus angustus, also known as Salt Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the coastal regions of Australia and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sporobolus angustus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Sporobolus angustus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
